programs.title: Nazi Megastructures: Battle Ready
programs.desc: Profiles of engineers responsible for the construction of the most dangerous military facilities.Their works contributed to the technological revolution.The figures of Heinrich Himmler and Joseph Goebbels, who were completely devoted to Hitler, will also be introduced.The Führer assigned them the task of building the Nazi social machine.The program will also discuss the attack on the Soviet Union and the failure of total war tactics.You will be able to learn about the creation of the battleships Bismarck and Tirpitz, as well as the bunkers intended to protect submarines.In addition, the creators will talk about the conflict in the Pacific and the largest floating fortress armed with powerful guns.

programs.title: How to Lose a War
programs.desc: The situation in 1941 indicated that the Axis powers would win the war.The conflict began with a series of brilliant victories for the Germans, Italians and Japanese.Hitler managed to conquer almost all of Europe.

programs.title: Border Patrol
programs.desc: Employees of the Customs Service and the Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry form a patrol guarding New Zealand's borders.The threat to the country is the smuggling of drugs, weapons and other illegal materials.

programs.title: Lost Cities Revealed with Albert Lin
programs.desc: Albert Lin explores ancient cities and learns the secrets of ancient builders.The respected scientist completed, among others:a search expedition for Genghis Khan's tomb in Mongolia.The researcher once again sets out on an extraordinary mission.Viewers will be able to watch him wander through the jungle, trying to find objects related to the Mayan settlement.As always, it is equipped with modern devices that allow you to scan the surroundings.The National Geographic envoy is not afraid of risk.He will break through untouched areas, cross wild rivers and slide down a rope into a giant cave.He will undertake all these daring feats to solve another mystery from the past.
